title: ItemGlow  Mod
description: ItemGlow adds a subtle but magical visual effect to dropped items in the world by surrounding them with customizable particles.
body:
ItemGlow — Particle Aura for Dropped Items
ItemGlow adds a subtle but magical visual effect to dropped items in the world by surrounding them with customizable particles. Whether you're hunting for loot or just want your gear to sparkle, this mod makes every item feel special.

✨ Features:
Floating particles around dropped items

Fully configurable via itemglow.cfg

RGB color control for particle tint

Armor-based coloring (optional)

Adjustable density and spread

In-game commands for live tweaking (/itemglow set, /itemglow reload)

🔧 Configuration Options:
maxDistance — how far particles are rendered

particleColorR/G/B — particle color (0–255)

useArmorColor — use item’s armor dye color

particleDensity — number of particles per tick

particleSpread — how far particles scatter

💬 Commands:
Use /itemglow get to view current settings, /itemglow set <parameter> <value> to change them, and /itemglow reload
